A '''battle''' occurred in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] between the combined forces of the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] and the [[Mere Resistance]] led by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] allied with [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] in an attempt to retake [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Nym's Base|pirate base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] The battle was fought in two parts, one in orbit around the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Khons]] and one on the ground, taking place [[22 BBY/Legends|ten years]] after the Federation [[Battle of Lok (32 BBY)|occupied]] the base.

==Prelude==
The Second Battle of Lok was fought between the allied forces of the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] and the [[Mere Resistance]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. After recovering parts of an [[Orbital Defense Cannon]] onto the ''[[Tritus]]'' at the [[Battle of Nod Kartha]], [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] forces set off to install the Cannon on [[Khons]] to help reclaim [[Nym's Base]] that was [[Battle of Lok (32 BBY)|lost]] ten years earlier. En route to Khons, the [[Mere cruiser]] ''Tritus'' suffered an engine failure. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Juno (captain)|Juno]] unloaded the parts to the Cannon onto [[Mere Tug]]s and entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The group's first step was to establish a foothold and install the Cannon to support the attack on the surface.

==The battle==
===Khons moon===
[[File:BattleOfKhons-JediStarfighter.jpg|thumb|left|300px|200px|The fight to establish the Orbital Cannon.]]
{{Quote|It's been too long. Get the cap turrets first. Let's make sure the tugs reach the moon intact. We'll have our base back before sunrise.|Nym at the beginning of the battle|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
Upon exiting hyperspace, Nym ordered his [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to take out the [[Capital ship turret|anti-capital ship turrets]] to make way for Juno and his [[Spacetug/Legends|tugs]]. Nym then received a message from [[Kole]] that several of their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] had dropped out of hyperspace and that there were only two of them left. Nevertheless, Nym was able to destroy the turrets before they could destroy the tugs.

The battle then moved to the planet side of the moon. The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] had a [[Fuel/Legends|refueling]] station where four [[Lupus-class missile frigate|Missile Frigates]] were stationed. Juno held the tugs out of range while Nym cleared a landing pad to assemble the Cannon on. After the frigates were destroyed, Kole landed to supervise the Cannon's construction. As the Cannon was being assembled, a wave of [[Trade Federation droid bomber|droid bombers]] approached to bomb it, soon followed by several more.

While Nym and his allies defended the Cannon from the bombers, a [[Trade Federation Cruiser (Second Battle of Lok)|Trade Federation Cruiser]] happened to arrive. The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] headed toward the moon and, once in range, began to fire waves of [[cruise missile]]s at the Orbital Cannon. Undaunted, Nym allowed the cruiser to keep coming so it would be in the Cannon's range. Kole then attempted to power up the Cannon, unwittingly frying its targeting systems. However, Kole was able to reroute the system through the targeting systems on Nym's [[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']]. Meanwhile, the cruiser powered up its weapons array to launch a final wave of missiles. Nym targeted the cruiser and Kole fired the Cannon, bringing down the shields of the cruiser. After recharging, the Cannon fired again, completely destroying the cruiser.

===Down to the surface===
The pirate fighters flew down to the planet's surface, where they were met by companies of tanks and squadrons of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid starfighters]]. Three [[Mere troop transport]]s held a high orbit while the fighters destroyed the tanks and [[Lupus-class missile frigate|Trade Federation Missile Frigates]] that were refueling on the ground. Once they were taken out, the transports moved in, protected by the [[Mere]] starfighters. The remaining Vulture droids swarmed on the ships, resulting in a fierce dogfight.

The transports, landing in a crater, launched speeder bikes led by [[Sol Sixxa]] into the base to blow the door. After the door was blasted open, Nym flew in and destroyed the docks for the frigates inside it. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] then flew out to attack the Resistance in her personal [[Bella's assault transport|ship]] but was killed by Nym. The Lok Revenants had finally reclaimed their base, albeit one that was drastically different.

==Aftermath==
With the planet secure, the pirates would be free to assist their allies fighting on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Their ships arrived just in time to fight with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and eliminate the remainder of Sabaoth Squadron.

==Behind the scenes==
This article was created based on two missions in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''. The first is the mission "Cannon Fodder." The mission's bonus objectives have the player destroying all the turrets on the moon and making sure all the Mere Tugs survive. The second is the mission "Heart of the Storm."
